title: Agency Mortgage-Backed Securities - Federal Reserve Bank of New York

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: This is a navigation hub page on the New York Fed website providing links to agency MBS operations data, schedules, and resources rather than containing substantive policy content itself. The page explains that the NY Fed's Open Market Trading Desk executes agency MBS purchases for the SOMA portfolio under FOMC direction, with transactions executed with primary dealers since early 2009.
key_points: The NY Fed is authorized by the FOMC to buy and sell agency MBS for the System Open Market Account (SOMA)
Dollar roll and coupon swap transactions may be executed to facilitate settlement of outstanding MBS purchases
Agency MBS purchases for SOMA began in early 2009 following FOMC directives
Transactions are executed with primary dealers
Recent linked statements include Small Value Exercises (Mar 3, 2026) and Reinvestment of Principal Payments (Oct 29, 2025)
Transaction data is published quarterly, approximately two years after conduct per Dodd-Frank Act requirements
why_it_matters: This page serves as a central reference point for agency MBS market operations data from the NY Fed. However, as a navigation hub rather than a substantive policy document, it has no direct archival value for research purposes. The linked announcements (Small Value Exercises Mar 3, 2026; Reinvestment statement Oct 29, 2025), FAQs, and data pages would be appropriate archive targets instead.
market_structure_context: The page describes the operational framework for agency MBS purchases and reinvestment within the Fed's SOMA portfolio, executed through the Open Market Trading Desk with primary dealers. It references links to operation schedules, planned operation amounts, and transaction data.

notes: Source is a navigation page structure rather than substantive content. Contains only overview text and links to data resources, operation schedules, and FAQs. No specific policy decisions, quantitative data, or forward guidance present. The recent announcements referenced (2026-03-03, 2025-11-05, 2025-10-29) are listed as links only, not included in this page's content. For meaningful market structure research, the linked 'Agency MBS Operations' data and 'Faqs on Agency MBS Operations' would be more valuable archive targets.
